action_set_definitions.name: get_flight_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current list of all active aircraft in the arrival sector, including their ID, weight category, distance to threshold (NM), current speed (KT), and current assigned runway.

action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current simulation time and the operational status of available runways.

action_set_definitions.name: update_flight_assignment
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the flight's target runway and/or commanded speed.

flight_id.description: The unique identifier of the aircraft.

action_set_definitions.name: set_holding_pattern
action_set_definitions.description: Places an aircraft into a holding pattern or clears it to resume the approach. Used to delay traffic.

flight_id.description: The unique identifier of the aircraft.

is_holding.description: True to hold, False to resume.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_simulation_time
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the simulation clock by a specified number of seconds, updating aircraft positions based on their current speeds.

state_description.active_flights: A list of aircraft currently in the arrival sector, including their ID, weight category, distance to threshold, current speed, and current assigned runway.
state_description.simulation_time: Current elapsed simulation time in seconds.
